PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ISSUE AND TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT RAQUEL SIMIEN, FOR AN ORDER THAT THE MATTERS IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, SET #2, BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS -- MATTER WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR UNLESS SHE SUBMITS PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1011(B). A HEARSAY PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE IS NOT COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED. THE PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE MUST BE SIGNED BY THE PERSON WHO ACTUALLY SERVED THE MOTION. THE SERVICE OF THE MOTION TO DEFENDANT'S POST OFFICE BOX BY EXPRESS MAIL WAS NOT TIMELY. PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
